title: Fresh Animations: Player Extension
description: Animates players in Fresh Animations' style. An official FA extension.
body:
Early access / previews available via Ko-fi with a Golem Tier membership ↓ [](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx/tiers) ![player scroll preview](https://imgur.com/ms4s3q6.png) ---
[](https://www.curseforge.com/members/freshlx/projects) [](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/freshlx/) [](https://ko-fi.com/freshlx) [](https://www.patreon.com/cw/FreshLX) [](https://discord.gg/Wxs7JEPMrH) [](https://x.com/Fresh_LX)

![Fresh Animations Extensions](https://imgur.com/tr9IVrp.png) Fresh Animations Extensions are extra resource packs with additional features for Fresh Animations.

[](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) --- ![EMF Required](https://imgur.com/141UN0L.png) This resource pack requires both Entity Model and Entity Texture Features (EMF & ETF) to work. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ---

![Details](https://imgur.com/b5K7mZp.png)
This resource pack extends Fresh Animations' style to the player model. Vanilla player animations are overhauled to be more dynamic and complex, and new ones are added.

### Previews: - [General movements](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/2002520750511763777) - [Water movements](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/2000795882950959199) - [Flying animations](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/1999420838320517464) - [First person animations](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/2001647848887324995) - [Misc. equipment animations](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/1998329280472752150) - [Torch and lantern animations](https://x.com/Fresh_LX/status/2064864517998461261)

### Feature List: #### Improved: - custom idle animation - custom head yaw and pitch animations - custom running animations (default speed) - custom sprinting animations - custom swimming animation - custom sneaking animations - custom prone animations - custom sitting/riding state - custom elytra gliding animations - custom attack/interact animation - smooth transitions between animations when items are equipped or used - armour leggings textures #### Added: - walking animations (slower speeds) - crawling state and animations - climbing state and animations - wading animation (walking in shallow water & lava) - jumping, falling and landing animations - treading water animations (default state in water) - swim upwards animation - sleeping animation - first person hand animations - cape animations - elytra animations - locking rotation when climbing ladders - backwards walking, running, sneaking, crawling, water treading - strafing animations for walking, running, sneaking - tilting/leaning #### Early Access, Experimental: - custom shield blocking animations - item equip and hotbar slot switch animations - armour equipped states - eating/drinking animation - holding torch animations - holding lantern animations - hurt / taking damage animation - Respackopts configuration

![player scroll preview](https://imgur.com/ms4s3q6.png)

---

The following terms apply specifically to the following assets/elements: - Custom Entity Models, including .jem and .jpm files - Custom Entity Model Animations - pack icons - If you use assets from this resource pack in your own, credit is required. Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge, Modrinth, or Planet Minecraft page - The creator has the final say about which terms apply to your use of this resource pack and its assets ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY:*** - modify the resource pack if it's for personal use only, meaning you cannot share it publicly - include this resource pack in your mod pack or server - use this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts - use an edited version of this resource pack in forms of content such as videos, live streams, blog posts, if the edited version is not publicly available - remix, transform, and build upon its assets in your own resource pack, within reason, if credit is given - earn money using remixed, transformed, and built upon assets in your own resource pack ____________________________________________ ***With this resource pack, YOU MAY NOT:*** - redistribute this resource pack - port this resource pack or its assets to work on Minecraft Bedrock Edition - include unedited assets in your own resource pack, unless you have permission from the creator - include assets from this resource pack in a paid product or paid access to a product, unless you have permission from the creator ____________________________________________
